description_long: This object is a compact axe with a single, broad blade and a short, straight handle. The blade is thick and robust, featuring a slightly curved cutting edge and a squared poll at the rear. The handle appears to be integrated with the blade, likely made from the same material, and lacks any visible grip texture or ergonomic shaping. The entire axe is rendered in a dark, metallic color, giving it a utilitarian and industrial appearance. There are no visible decorative elements, engravings, or brand markings on the surface. The overall design suggests it is intended for heavy-duty chopping or splitting tasks in an urban or workshop environment.
description: A compact, dark-colored axe with a thick, curved blade and a short, straight handle, all in a utilitarian style.
description_view_0: The axe is seen from the side, showing the full profile of the blade and the straight handle.
description_view_1: The axe is viewed from the front, highlighting the broad, curved cutting edge of the blade.
description_view_2: The opposite side profile of the axe is visible, mirroring the first view with the blade and handle in silhouette.
description_view_3: The rear of the axe is shown, displaying the squared poll and the back of the handle.
attribute_handle_type: Short, straight handle, likely steel, with a rectangular cross-section and no visible grip features.
attribute_blade_design: Single, broad blade with a slightly curved cutting edge and squared poll; no beard or decorative features.
attribute_mounting_style: Integrated, likely a single-piece construction with no visible mounting hardware.
